descricao: Exemplo de roteiro para geração automatizada de vídeos

cenas.dalle_prompt: A breathtaking mountain landscape at dawn, with golden sunlight breaking through misty peaks, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, 4K quality
cenas.grok_movement: Slow camera pan from left to right, revealing more mountain peaks as the sun rises, with morning mist gently flowing through valleys
Smooth zoom into the forest below the mountains, camera descends through the mist towards the tree canopy

cenas.dalle_prompt: Dense mystical forest interior, rays of sunlight filtering through tall trees, moss-covered rocks, magical atmosphere, fantasy style, high detail
cenas.grok_movement: Camera moves forward through the forest, weaving between trees, with dynamic lighting as sunbeams shift
Camera emerges from forest to reveal a hidden crystalline lake, circular pan around the water's edge

cenas.descricao: Final - Reflexo do céu no lago
cenas.dalle_prompt: Crystal clear lake reflecting a vibrant sunset sky, mountains in the background, perfect mirror reflection, serene and peaceful, cinematic composition
cenas.grok_movement: Slow aerial rise above the lake, revealing the full landscape as the camera tilts down showing the reflection, fade to sunset
